description_long: This object is a sleek, black wireless computer mouse with a contoured, ergonomic shape designed to fit comfortably in the hand. The top surface features a scroll wheel and two main click buttons, with a subtle seam running along the sides for grip and style. The rear of the mouse displays a glowing green Razer logo, indicating its gaming-oriented branding and likely LED backlighting. The sides are smooth with a slight matte finish, and the overall build appears to be made of durable plastic with internal electronic components. The mouse is compact and lightweight, suitable for desktop use and easy portability. Its design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A sleek, black wireless computer mouse with a glowing green Razer logo and ergonomic design. Features a scroll wheel, two main buttons, and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, contoured profile and subtle seam detail along the body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the scroll wheel and the symmetrical button layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the contoured shape and seam, with no visible buttons.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the illuminated green Razer logo on the back of the mouse.
